name: adapt
description: Owner-gated semi-automated harness adaptation. Two modes: (A) adapt-on-failure — RCA + fix a workflow whose machinery failed during a run (threshold: same root-cause fail >=2); (B) adapt-on-repetition — design + build a new workflow for a repeated task pattern (threshold: pattern >=3 occurrences, or learning_recall returns same note >=3, or scanner_promotion reports bug_class >=3). POST-run only — never runs MID-run while the target workflow is active. Six safety gates: owner-gated (no auto-spawn from intent words), POST-run, no-self-fix (adapt never modifies adapt/ itself), pin-version (diff + backup, owner approves + commits before apply), threshold (fail >=2 / pattern >=3), conflict-check (Mode B refuses duplicate workflows). Reuses mh-rca (RCA) + mh-implementer (fix files) + harness_doctor (validate) + harness_backup (rollback). Stop enum {DONE, CAP_HIT, BLOCKED, PARKED}.
implementation_kind: agent-orchestrated-meta (blind coordinator over a 2-mode adapt pipeline; RCA + plan + fix/build + validate; owner approves every apply)

A: target_workflow: the workflow name whose machinery failed
failure_evidence: path to the failed run ledger / envelope / error artifact (the RCA input)
fail_count: number of times this root-cause has failed (must be >=2 to enter Mode A)
root_cause_signature: a short stable key deduplicating failures (so 'same root-cause' is verifiable)
B: repetition_signal: one of — learning_recall note seen >=3 times | scanner_promotion bug_class >=3 | agent-observed task-type repeated >=3 (cite the 3+ occurrences with paths)
proposed_workflow_name: candidate slug (conflict-checked against harness_doctor registry + REGISTRY.md before building)
pattern_description: one-line of the repeated task the new workflow would automate

validators: python scripts/harness_doctor.py --strict        # registry + governance + runtime-contract must stay green
python scripts/harness_backup.py --snapshot       # pin a backup before any apply (rollback anchor)

A.summary: adapt-on-failure — RCA + fix a failing workflow (POST-run, threshold >=2 same root-cause)

phases.name: intake
phases.done_check: failure_evidence + root_cause_signature recorded in ledger; fail_count >=2 verified

phases.name: rca
phases.done_check: 03-rca written: workflow bug root cause + DIRECT_PATCH | REDESIGN | HUMAN_DECISION

phases.name: fix-plan
phases.done_check: 04-adapt-plan written: allowlist of workflow files to edit + validation + rollback; owner approved

phases.name: fix
phases.done_check: workflow files patched per allowlist; self-review-diff clean; harness_backup snapshot taken pre-apply

phases.name: validate
phases.done_check: harness_doctor --strict green; target workflow self-test green; replay failed run on synthetic input passes OR residual risk stated

B.summary: adapt-on-repetition — design + build a new workflow for a repeated pattern (threshold >=3; conflict-checked)

phases.name: intake
phases.done_check: repetition_signal verified (>=3 occurrences cited); proposed_workflow_name conflict-checked against registry + REGISTRY.md (refuse if duplicate)

phases.name: design
phases.done_check: design doc written: manifest draft + README skeleton + recipe/phases + entry skill stub + prompt + reuse map; owner approved the design before any file is created

phases.name: build
phases.done_check: workflow files created per design allowlist (engine/workflows/<new>/ + engine/skills/<new>/ + engine/prompts/<new>.md); self-review-diff clean; harness_backup snapshot taken pre-apply

phases.name: wire
phases.done_check: REGISTRY.md + AGENTS.md + HARNESS-GUIDE.md updated with the new workflow row + owner-gated entry; owner approved the wiring

phases.name: validate
phases.done_check: harness_doctor --strict green (registry resolves, governance clean); new workflow self-test green; dry-run on a synthetic input passes OR residual risk stated

safety_gates: owner-gated APPLY — auto-detection + proposal is automatic (adapt_trigger SessionEnd hook + adapt_fail_watch PostToolUse hook), but applying (fix/build/wire) is owner-gated; no auto-spawn of a fixer from intent words or a trigger
POST-run — adapt runs AFTER the target workflow ends, never MID-run while PM is dispatching it (the fail-watch hook only QUEUES a trigger MID-session; the apply runs POST-run)
no-self-fix — adapt NEVER modifies engine/workflows/adapt/ or engine/skills/adapt/ or engine/prompts/adapt.md (bootstrap paradox); if adapt itself is broken, the owner fixes it by hand
pin-version — adapt emits a diff + takes a harness_backup snapshot BEFORE any apply; owner approves + commits before the change takes effect; no silent mutate mid-session

threshold — Mode A requires fail_count >=2 with the same root_cause_signature (no adapt on first fail — could be data); the PostToolUse fail-watch bypasses this only because it has already confirmed status + machinery hint (its detection IS the second confirmation); Mode B requires >=3 occurrences cited with paths
conflict-check — Mode B refuses to build a workflow whose name already exists in harness_doctor registry or REGISTRY.md (prevents bloat self-generation)
